rule: State transitions apply only to named bounded scopes with merged artifact, test and CI evidence. Connected providers, production, missing sources and owner acceptance remain separate gates.

merged_evidence.scope: dependency-free local completion runtime and deterministic domain slices
Knowledge Fabric backup/restore, durable queue, deterministic federation exercises, operator and continuity packs
governed self-evolution, editable-object registry and unified assistant
concrete model selector, two-to-eight-model panel and three-file ChatHub V3 intake
current tranche: provider preflight/adapters, SQLite panel evidence, Command Centre v1.3 and shared editor controls

task_state_corrections.scope: Command Centre v1.3 local model selector, panel metrics, editor surfaces and progress API; external adapters and authenticated deployed UI remain open.
Local resilience, backup/restore, queue, incident exercises and self-evolution controls; connected infrastructure and provider operations remain open.
Multiple bounded source batches including three ChatHub files; missing exports and inaccessible history remain pending or blocked.
Core control plane, editable objects, model selector, panel store and deterministic provider adapters; whole-program denominator and connected runtime remain open.
Source ranking, model routing, concrete selectors, provider adapter contracts and evidence capture; live current-source research remains open.
Shared governance, model, persistence, UX and workflow contracts; complete connected shared-core runtime remains open.

next_execution_tranche: LIVE-01 provider inventory and cost-readiness scan
LIVE-02 authorised local or included-provider two-model canary
LIVE-03 persist, synthesize and independently verify one real panel run
UI-02 authenticated staging operator journey and accessibility tests
NOW-07 process each newly accessible source batch
P0 owner/provider actions where access is supplied

hard_blocks.reason: Authoritative Railway domain and provider configuration
Google Apps Script, Sheet and Railway configuration
Provider workflow dispatch and runtime result
Protected host identity and authorised canary source
Connected staging endpoints and vault-held signing references
Missing or opaque source bytes prevent universal source completion
Provider model inventories, credentials, endpoints, pricing and explicit execution approval
Owner approval, provider accounts, costs and production secrets
All prior tasks plus explicit owner acceptance

truth_boundary: Repository-local provider adapters and fake-transport tests are not live provider proof. Whole-program 100 percent remains unavailable until every source, connected staging, production and owner-acceptance gate is resolved.
